channel.title: Authors on Paulius.uk
channel.description: Recent content in Authors on Paulius.uk

item.description: I enjoy coding, setting up devices, working with both Linux and Windows systems, and testing different software programs. My aim is to learn and study a lot, not just for myself, but also to aid others in understanding and learning. I’m dedicated to continuous learning, keeping up with developments in the IT world, and sharing my knowledge to empower others.
